# Badger Grapple Red Engine v2.7

## Improvements
- New title screen panel with save stats.
- Starter select now shows stat bars, move list, and style edge info.
- Scout reports explain the recruit loop more clearly.
- Early scout-zone opponent levels are slightly easier for phone testing.
- Battle result card now shows score, turns, streak, rewards, invites, and next action.
- Win streak is tracked in the menu and result card.
- Overworld objective wording is clearer.
- Deployed build loads `src_v2_7/main.js?v=27`.

## Verify
The note under the game should say:
`Engine v2.7 recruit polish. Better title flow, starter scouting, result cards, streaks, and clearer recruiting prompts.`
